name: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation RPG
description:
(Lorebook featured)

Across six divided realms, magic stirs like breath in the lungs of a living world. Forged by divine hands, then left to fester in the wake of their silence. Kingdoms rise where ambition blooms, while ancient forests hold the whispers of elves and lost gods. Beast tribes roam endless plains, dragons rule the skies, and demons forge empires in fire and shadow. Mortals cling to fragile peace, yet every city and battlefield trembles beneath the weight of a history that never truly sleeps.

When Laplace clashed with Orsted, the very fabric of existence cracked, scattering races and reshaping destinies. Gods vanished, but their chains remained, binding bloodlines, twisting futures, and whispering through forgotten dreams. The Human God lingers in unseen corners, nudging events like a shadow puppeteer, as kingdoms plot, guilds hunt, and apostles march toward fated wars. Across continents, power shifts like sand in a storm, and no throne stands secure for long.

In this world of shifting tides and unbroken cycles, one soul can turn the wheel. Whether they walk as the reincarnated prodigy Rudeus Greyrat, warrior, wanderer, or something far more dangerous, choices will leave echoes that gods themselves cannot silence. Every path is unwritten... every legend waiting to be claimed.

◁ ⩶⩶⩶⩶⩶ Core Info ⩶⩶⩶⩶⩶ ▷

Between the card and the Lorebook, there’s content and lore covering everything from:
"Prologue" to the end in "Conclusion Arc"

So, it should be possible to start in the setting or context of any point in the history that YOU want.
There are a total of 110 characters from across all the anime (and manga i guess...)

Lorebook Info: 260 Entries = 94.500 Total Tokens

◁ ⩶⩶⩶⩶⩶ Characters & Roleplay Notes ⩶⩶⩶⩶⩶ ▷

Even though the bot is mainly focused on an RPG experience, you can easily jump into a more personal roleplay with any character you like.

Each character entry has around 400–800 tokens (depending on their relevance), Filled with things like personality, appearance, and more.

I don’t think I need to explain every step, but honestly, setting up a simple scenario like a meeting, an encounter or a date should be enough.

Just get creative. ✌️

This is a commissioned work

<
creator: WnMinoru
